summary.assessment: Partial recovery detected: Vercel infrastructure is responding. API endpoints returning 4xx errors instead of timing out. This is a significant improvement from complete network timeout.

assessment.interpretation: 🟡 RECOVERY SIGNAL — Infrastructure is no longer timing out. Endpoints are returning HTTP error codes, indicating the Vercel deployment infrastructure has recovered from complete failure, though routes/endpoints may not be correctly deployed or configured.

actions.monitoring: Continue 2-minute polling cycles to track recovery progression
